flagged_messages.message_text: ROW-2374: 'And Abby doesn't need to tell her that she can't have a treat if she tells me what's going on. That bitch can shut her fucking whore mouth' | ROW-2376: 'And don't be leaving her in the car with Abby alone either. That's contempt of court' | ROW-2377: 'Don't ever leave olivia in the car by herself or with just Abby. I will file contempt charges' | ROW-2378: 'Don't teach her to lie or keep things from me and check your bitch when she's being mean to Olivia' | ROW-2379: 'She was only with you for three hours. There is no reason she should be left alone. You can't handle three hours a week? Wtf. You idiot'
flagged_messages.primary_reasoning: FIRST parenting-conduct contempt threat in dataset. ADD-002 temporal rule: first instance in a new legal-threat category = Sev-2. Prior contempt threats (B-003, B-004, B-007 ROW-2479) were all financial-enforcement threats. ROW-2376-2377 introduces a qualitatively different threat category: contempt filing to control Eli's parenting conduct (specifically, leaving Olivia with Abby). 'That's contempt of court' + 'I WILL file contempt charges' — the capitalized present-tense 'WILL' signals heightened certainty vs. the questioning 'do I need to file contempt?' of prior financial threats. This threat is closer to Eli's stated primary fear: using legal mechanisms to control access to and parenting of Olivia, with Abby as the compliance vector. Melissa is asserting that Eli cannot leave Olivia with Abby — if followed, this would restrict Abby's involvement in Eli's household. The threat functions as both a legal threat and a relationship-control mechanism (forcing Eli to choose between his household arrangement and avoiding legal action). Per ADD-001: the Abby element here is RF-04+RF-15 primary, but the contempt filing threat for parenting conduct is RF-05 Sev-2 primary. Cross-reference: RF-04 pass identified this cluster as COMP-RF04-007 (RF-04+RF-01+RF-05) — Eli-reacts-to-Abby-exclusion-demand + child relay mechanism. The RF-05 component is the contempt filing threat.

peripheral_flags.note: ROW-2374: 'That bitch can shut her fucking whore mouth' — extreme Abby attack (COMP-RF04-007 per RF-04 B-007). RF-04 primary. ADD-001: RF-05 peripheral aggressive-tone only for the Abby-attack language itself.

ROW-2380/2397-2410: Olivia relay — 'Olivia was crying saying Abby was mean to her' / 'She said she doesn't want Abby around' / 'She is adamant that she doesn't want to go with you if Abby is with you' — Abby-exclusion demand via Olivia-voice relay. RF-04+RF-01 primary (COMP-RF04-007).

flagged_messages.context_notes: The parenting-conduct contempt threat (ROW-2376-2377) is embedded within a multi-vector attack: Abby verbal aggression ('whore mouth'), contempt threat for conduct, child-relay exclusion demand (Olivia doesn't want Abby), and intelligence contempt ('You idiot'). The cluster represents the first instance where legal-threat language is used to control Eli's relationship with Abby rather than to enforce financial obligations. This is a qualitative escalation in the RF-05 pattern.

flagged_messages.message_text: ROW-2479: 'Or do I need to file another contempt? This is getting old'
flagged_messages.primary_reasoning: Fourth instance of financial-contempt filing threat. ADD-002: Sev-1 (recurring, paper tiger trajectory). The 'This is getting old' tag is notable — Melissa herself characterizes the payment dispute as a recurring issue, confirming the compliance-cycle pattern. The frustration framing does not reduce the threat value for the arc record; it reinforces the established pattern.
flagged_messages.context_notes: Isolated message in a separate episode from the Apr 22 Abby-contempt cluster. Financial enforcement continuation.

arc_state_snapshot.note: ARC-RF05-001 ACTIVE. B-007 adds signals S006 (Sev-2, parenting-conduct contempt — new category) and S007 (Sev-1, financial contempt repeat). The parenting-conduct contempt (ROW-2376-2377) is the arc's second Sev-2 signal and represents the first direct legal threat to Eli's parenting choices rather than financial obligations.

batch_observations.tone_assessment: B-007 (Apr-Jun 2023) introduces the most significant RF-05 escalation to date: the parenting-conduct contempt threat targeting Olivia's contact with Abby. This is the first time Melissa weaponizes legal action to control Eli's household arrangement. The threat language shifts from questioning ('do I need to file?') to declarative ('I WILL file contempt charges'). Combined with the financial contempt repeat, B-007 has the highest RF-05 flag count of any batch to date (2 primary flags).
batch_observations.cross_rf_context: RF-04 pass: COMP-RF04-007 (ROW-2373 B-007) is this batch's primary RF-04 compound. The RF-05 parenting-conduct contempt (ROW-2376-2377) is embedded in that same cluster but operates as RF-05 primary independent of the RF-04 Abby-attack primary.
